title: Language change - Case Update Needed popup is not present after Language Change
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup is not displayed after changing language in Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Select a different language from the list.
Confirm the language change and allow the update to complete.
Observe the screen after the update completes.
expected: After the language change update completes, the "Case Update Needed" popup/card should be displayed, as it is expected to appear after any firmware update (including language change updates).
